description_long: This is a youthful adult pedestrian dressed in a martial arts-inspired outfit, featuring a sleeveless tunic with a belted waist, fingerless gloves, and a knee support on the left leg. The individual has a fit, athletic build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting readiness or a pose for character modeling. The footwear consists of high-top sneakers, and the hands are protected by padded gloves, indicating a sporty or combat-oriented persona. The hair is styled in a short, tousled cut with a long ribbon tied at the back, adding a dynamic flair. The overall appearance is that of an active, energetic person, possibly a martial artist or athlete, suitable for urban or park environments.
description: Athletic adult in a martial arts-inspired outfit with gloves, knee support, and high-top sneakers, exuding a sporty, energetic vibe. Short tousled hair with a ribbon completes the dynamic look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, gloves, knee support, and facial features, with arms extended and sneakers visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile, arm extension, knee support, and the tied ribbon trailing from the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the tunic, both arms, the ribbon, and the back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and sneaker, but without the knee support.
attribute_clothing_type: martial arts tunic with belted waist, fingerless gloves, knee support, and athletic shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short tousled hair with a long tied ribbon at the back
